name: replayio
description: Record browser sessions with the Replay Browser via Playwright CLI, analyze recordings through the connected Replay ChatGPT app, and auto-upload recordings when the browser closes or the turn ends.

interface.shortDescription: Record browser sessions and analyze recordings
interface.longDescription: Drive a real browser with Playwright CLI against the Replay Browser to capture time-travel debuggable recordings, auto-upload them on close, and analyze uploaded recordings through the connected Replay ChatGPT app.
defaultPrompt: Record a Playwright session against this local app and analyze the resulting recording
